title: Tau 4 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa - Ministry of Education
content:
## Tau 4 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
Understand what your child will have learned by the end of Tau 4 at kura, and ideas or activities to help support their learning at home.

We’re inviting whānau to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey
- Pāngarau – Tau 4 Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i te Pāngarau hei te mutunga o te Tau 4 ki te kura. Find out more
